# Sameen Sardar S

> Personal portfolio of Sameen Sardar S — Founder, Creative Director, and CS undergraduate based in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India.

## About
Sameen Sardar S is the co-founder of Tenztro Private Limited, a product and brand studio. He has 4+ years of brand identity design experience, has served international clients. He holds a national design role at IEEE CS India and graduates mid-2026.

## Companies Founded
- Tenztro Private Limited — Contract SaaS development and design studio (2025)
- BillOPZ — GST compliance business suite for Indian SMEs (2025)
- Grafyo — Creative design house (2024)

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/simply-sameen
- X: https://x.com/sameensardars

## Current Status
Pre-seed. Open to seed conversations and select brand work.
